title: A Python Library for the Theoretical-Numerical Search and Localization of Hidden Attractors
description: Python software and reproducible workflows for Lur'e-compatible integer and Caputo fractional-order chaotic systems, including seed generation, continuation, integration, hiddenness audits, and validation contracts. Maintained examples include integer Chua, non-smooth fractional Chua, and smooth arctan fractional Chua validation lanes.

creators.name: Moreno Lopez, Maria Fernanda
creators.affiliation: Instituto Nacional de Astrofisica, Optica y Electronica (INAOE)
